features: 72H SWEAT BLOCK PROTECTION – This women’s anti-perspirant offers reliable defence against sweat and odour, keeping you fresh and confident all day long
PEARL EXTRACTS – Enriched with natural pearl extracts and Avocado Oil, this NIVEA deodorant for women evens skin tone and leaves underarms soft and smooth
DELICATE FLORAL FRAGRANCE – The ladies deodorant features a long-lasting floral scent that delights your senses while offering effective anti-perspirant care
HOW TO USE – Shake well and hold the can 15 cm from the underarm. Spray evenly and allow it to dry completely before dressing for optimal protection
ALCOHOL-FREE FORMULA – Gentle on skin, this NIVEA women's anti-perspirant is free from ethyl alcohol and dermatologically approved, making it ideal for all skin types
description: Product Description " NIVEA Pearl & Beauty Anti-Perspirant Spray (150ml) – Care and protection for beautiful underarms Experience reliable protection and underarm care with NIVEA Pearl & Beauty Anti-Perspirant, a gentle yet effective formula designed to beautify and protect. Enriched with natural pearl extracts, it helps even out skin tone, while Avocado Oil leaves your underarms feeling soft, smooth, and nourished. This anti-perspirant offers Derma 72h Active Protection, providing long-lasting defence against sweat and odour while remaining kind to your skin. With its delicate floral fragrance, it keeps you feeling fresh and confident all day. Dermatologically approved and free from ethyl alcohol, it’s perfect for all skin types, delivering care and protection in one. How to use: Hold the can 15 cm from the underarm and spray evenly. Allow the product to dry completely before dressing. Product Benefits: Provides 72-hour reliable anti-perspirant protection Beautifies underarms with natural pearl extracts Enriched with Avocado Oil for soft, smooth skin Features a lasting floral fragrance Dermatologically tested and alcohol-free 150ml " Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isopropyl Palmitate, Parfum, Hydrolyzed Pearl, Talc, Persea Gratissima Oil, Octyldodecanol, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Dimethicone, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, Geraniol, Benzyl Alcohol. Directions Apply in the morning or after showering. Shake well before use and then hold the can 15 cm away from the forearm and spray. Do not apply to injured or irritated skin. Allow the product to dry completely before dressing. Directions for use: hold 15cm away from the forearm and spray on. Safety Warning Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurised container: May burst if heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50­°C. Empty can before recycling. Use exclusively for the intended purpose. Do not spray into eyes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Keep out of reach of children. Solvent Abuse Can Kill Instantly. Manufacturer Contact Information 2010 Solihull Parkwy Birmingham Bus Park Birmingham B37 7Ys See more
